subject: (no subject)
body:
I like the IT guy - was having darren meet him tonight, but he got tied up - will have Darren meet him tom- if you want to meet him, tom is the only time as he leaves Wed for a week for holiday..we did not discuss you at all..just the job 




Thx

G
